exploration_notes: The bug is in ModelChoiceField.prepare_value() in django/forms/models.py (line 1572). When a ForeignKey uses to_field (e.g., to_field='code'), there are two code paths that generate values: (1) ModelChoiceIterator.choice() calls prepare_value(model_instance), which correctly uses serializable_value(to_field_name) to produce 'US'; (2) model_to_dict() calls Field.value_from_object() (django/db/models/fields/__init__.py:1149) via getattr(obj, attname), returning the raw FK column value.
